name: Almond Pinecones
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread almonds in a single layer in a shallow baking pan.
2. Bake at 300°F for 15 minutes, stirring often, until the almonds just begin to turn color.
3. In a bowl, combine softened cream cheese and mayonnaise; mix well.
4. Add crumbled bacon, chopped green onion, dill weed, and pepper; mix well.
5. Cover the mixture and chill overnight in the refrigerator.
6. To serve, shape the chilled cheese mixture into two pinecone forms on a serving platter.
7. Beginning at the narrow end, press almonds at a slight angle into the cheese mixture in rows.
8. Continue overlapping rows until all of the cheese is covered.
9. Garnish with artificial pine sprigs and serve with crackers. Makes 1 1/2 cups.
